core_mechanism: reduction of an unbounded symbolic constraint-satisfaction problem to a finite Boolean satisfiability instance by enumerating all instantiations over a fixed finite domain, then deciding it with a complete backtracking search (systematic case-splitting on truth values with unit propagation) that returns a consistent assignment when one exists
brief_reason: The abstract fixes a finite domain size, constructs the finite set of ground instances, and hands the resulting propositional problem to a Davis-Putnam-Logemann-Loveland decision procedure, which is exactly a grounding-to-SAT reduction solved by complete backtracking search.
